Documentation for internal tools in the pbl repository, including installation and command creation instructions.

# Purpose
The content describes the purpose and usage of an internal tool repository named `pbl`. This repository is intended for internal tools that are not suitable for public release, distinguishing it from `pebble-tool-dev`, which contains tools that are not yet public but may be in the future. To install the tools from this repository, use the provided `pip install` command. To add new commands, create a file in the `pbl/commands` directory and define a class that inherits from `BaseCommand` or `PebbleCommand`. The class should include a docstring for help documentation and a `command` field to specify the command's name. The `__call__` method of the class will execute the command when invoked. Examples of command implementations can be found in the `pebble-tool` repository.
